RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.alfalfa module

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.alfalfa.Alfalfa(*, species: str = 'alfalfa', name: str = 'default alfalfa', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'ALFA', scientific_name: str = Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for alfalfa.

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0417

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0035

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.029

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0028

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = True

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 20.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.002

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 3000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 4.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default alfalfa'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'perennial_legume'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'ALFA'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Medicago sativa'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'alfalfa'

the species of the crop

Bases: AlfalfaSilage

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Alfalfa baleage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=42.883

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=7.419

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0327536

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00351

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Alfalfa baleage currently has the same harvest and quality properties as Alfalfa silage.

name: str = 'alfalfa baleage'

the name of this specific crop instance

species: str = 'alfalfa_baleage'

the species of the crop

Bases: Alfalfa

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Alfalfa hay.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.85

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.35

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=42.883

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=6.643

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0250

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00282

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Alfalfa baleage currently has the same harvest and quality properties as Alfalfa silage.

dry_matter_percentage: float = 88.136

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 6.643

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.35

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'alfalfa hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.85

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'alfalfa_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.033192

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00282

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: Alfalfa

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Alfalfa silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=42.883

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=7.419

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0327536

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00351

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 42.883

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 7.419

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.4

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'alfalfa silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'alfalfa_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0327536

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00351

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.cereal_rye module

Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for cereal rye.

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0231

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 35.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.013

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1800

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default cereal_rye'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 12.5

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'RYE'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Secale cereale'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.8

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'cereal_rye'

the species of the crop

Bases: CerealRyeSilage

Crop data class with default values for cereal rye baleage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.68

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=34.881

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.932

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0230944

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00371

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Cereal rye baleage has the same harvest parameters as cereal rye silage.

name: str = 'cereal_rye baleage'

the name of this specific crop instance

species: str = 'cereal_rye_baleage'

the species of the crop

None, yield_nitrogen: float | None = None, yield_phosphorus: float | None = None, residue_nitrogen: float | None = None, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: CerealRye

Crop data class with default values for cereal rye grain.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.3

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.20

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=85.962

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=1.547

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0188864

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00381

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 85.962

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 1.547

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'cereal_rye grain'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.3

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'cereal_rye_grain'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0188864

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00381

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for cereal rye grain.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.50

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.30

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=86.0907

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=6.205

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0140

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00309

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 92.705

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 6.205

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.64

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'cereal_rye hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.85

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'cereal_rye_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012192

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00179

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CerealRye

Crop data class with default values for cereal rye silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.68

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=34.881

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.932

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0230944

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00371

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 34.881

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.932

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.68

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'cereal_rye silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'cereal_rye_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0230944

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00371

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for corn.

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.047

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0048

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0177

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0018

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 39.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0138

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0014

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 3.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 8.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default corn'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'CORN'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Zea mays'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'corn'

the species of the crop

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.corn.CornGrain(*, species: str = 'corn_grain', name: str = 'corn grain', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'CORN', scientific_name: str = 'Zea mays', plant_category: PlantCategory = PlantCategory.WARM_ANNUAL, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: Bases: Corn

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Corn silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.50

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.30

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=86.0907

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=1.37

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0140

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00309

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 86.0907

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 1.37

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.4

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'corn grain'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.6

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'corn_grain'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.014

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00309

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: Corn

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Corn silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=35.361

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=3.054

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0140

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00232

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 35.361

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 3.054

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.68

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'corn silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'corn_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.014

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00232

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.soybean module

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for soy bean

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0524

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0074

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0265

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0037

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = True

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 25.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0258

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0035

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 3.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1700

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 10.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default soybean'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual_legume'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'SOYB'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Glycine max'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'soybean'

the species of the crop

Bases: Soybean

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Soybean grain.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.35

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.26

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=89.105

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=1.516

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.063968

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00654

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 89.105

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 1.516

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.26

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'soybean grain'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.35

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'soybean_grain'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.063968

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00654

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: Soybean

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Soybean hay.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.54

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=91.578

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=7.227

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0321328

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.0028

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 91.578

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 7.227

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.54

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'soybean hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'soybean_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0321328

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0028

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for tall fescue

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.056

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0099

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.021

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0022

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default tall_fescue'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 15.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'perennial'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'FESC'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Festuca arundinaceae'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.8

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'tall_fescue'

the species of the crop

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 5.616, dry_down_fraction: float = 0.2, optimal_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.073, user_harvest_index: float | None = None, potential_harvest_index: float | None None, yield_nitrogen: float | None = None, yield_phosphorus: float | None = None, residue_nitrogen: float | None = None, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: TallFescueSilage

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Tall Fescue baleage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.4

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=39.612

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=5.616

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0229376

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00302

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Tall fescue baleage currently has the same harvest and quality properties as Tall Fescue silage.

name: str = 'tall_fescue baleage'

the name of this specific crop instance

species: str = 'tall_fescue_baleage'

the species of the crop

Bases: TallFescue

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Tall Fescue hay.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.85

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.37

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=88.331

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.167

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.021248

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00281

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 88.331

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.167

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.37

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'tall_fescue hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.85

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'tall_fescue_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.021248

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00281

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: TallFescue

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Tall Fescue silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.90

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.4

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=39.612

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=5.616

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0229376

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00302

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 39.612

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 5.616

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.4

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'tall_fescue silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'tall_fescue_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0229376

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00302

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.triticale module

= None, harvest_index: float | None = None, cut_biomass: float | None = None, wet_yield_collected: float | None = None, dry_matter_yield_collected: float | None = None, yield_residue: float | None = None, yield_nitrogen: float | None = None, yield_phosphorus: float | None = None, residue_nitrogen: float | None = None, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for triticale.

Notes

We use the closest analog data available which is the Durum Wheat data.

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0231

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.013

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default triticale'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 15.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'DWHT'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Triticum durum'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'triticale'

the species of the crop

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.triticale.TriticaleBaleage(*, species: str = 'triticale_baleage', name: str = 'triticale baleage', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'DWHT', scientific_name: str = 'Triticum durum', plant_category: PlantCategory = PlantCategory.COOL_ANNUAL, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: bool = True, planting_year: int = 0, planting_day: int = 100, next_harvest_year: int = 0, next_harvest_day: int = 250, use_heat_scheduling: bool = False, Bases: TriticaleSilage

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Triticale baleage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.9

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.7

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=33.281

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.313

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0284544

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00409

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Triticale baleage currently has the same harvest and quality properties as Triticale silage.

name: str = 'triticale baleage'

the name of this specific crop instance

species: str = 'triticale_baleage'

the species of the crop

Bases: Triticale

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Triticale grain.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.3

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.2

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=88.374

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=1.786

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0192848

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00348

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 88.374

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 1.786

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'triticale grain'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.3

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'triticale_grain'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0192848

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00348

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: Triticale

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Triticale hay.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.85

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.65

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=91.019

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.844

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0165264

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00236

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 91.019

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.844

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.65

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'triticale hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.85

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'triticale_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0165264

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00236

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.313, dry_down_fraction: float = 0.2, optimal_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.073, user_harvest_index: float | None = None, potential_harvest_index: float | None = None, harvest_index: float | None = None, cut_biomass: float | None = None, wet_yield_collected: float | None = None, dry_matter_yield_collected: float | None = None, yield_residue: float | None = None, yield_nitrogen: float | None = None, yield_phosphorus: float | None = None, residue_nitrogen: float | None = None, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: Triticale

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Triticale silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.9

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.7

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=33.281

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.313

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0284544

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00409

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 33.281

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.313

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.7

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'triticale silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'triticale_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0284544

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00409

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.winter_wheat module

Bases: CropData

Crop data class with default values for winter wheat.

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0663

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0053

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0255

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.002

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0148

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0012

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1300

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default winter_wheat'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_temperature: float = 18.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'WWHT'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Triticum aestivum'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.45

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'winter_wheat'

the species of the crop

Bases: WinterWheatSilage

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Winter Wheat silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.9

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.6

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=34.801

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.991

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0171648

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00293

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

Notes

Winter Wheat baleage currently has the same harvest and quality properties as Winter Wheat silage.

name: str = 'winter_wheat baleage'

the name of this specific crop instance

species: str = 'winter_wheat_baleage'

the species of the crop

Bases: WinterWheat

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Winter Wheat grain.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.5

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.25

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=85.689

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=1.518

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.021576

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00359

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 85.689

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 1.518

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.25

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'winter_wheat grain'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.5

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'winter_wheat_grain'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.021576

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00359

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_configurations.winter_wheat.WinterWheatHay(*, species: str = 'winter_wheat_hay', name: str = 'winter_wheat hay', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'WWHT', Bases: WinterWheat

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Winter Wheat hay.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.85

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.55

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=90.592

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.905

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0158032

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00233

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 90.592

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.905

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.55

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'winter_wheat hay'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.85

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'winter_wheat_hay'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0158032

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00233

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: WinterWheat

Crop data class with yield-related properties for Winter Wheat silage.

Attributes

optimal_harvest_index: float, default=0.9

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in optimal growing conditions (unitless).

min_harvest_index: float, default=0.6

Fraction of crop biomass that is harvested in water-stressed growing conditions (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float, default=34.801

Percentage of harvested crop biomass that is dry matter (unitless).

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float, default=4.991

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float, default=0.0171648

Fraction of dry matter crop yield that is nitrogen (unitless).

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float default=0.00293

Fraction of wet crop yield that is phosphorus (unitless).

dry_matter_percentage: float = 34.801

Percentage of fresh yield that is dry matter (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

lignin_dry_matter_percentage: float = 4.991

Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless). Note: this value is the default for Sorghum harvested as a grain.

min_harvest_index: float = 0.6

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

name: str = 'winter_wheat silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

species: str = 'winter_wheat_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0171648

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.00293

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)
